pro_brother.song_name: You Dont Know How It Feels

content:
Song: You don't know how it feels
Artist: Tom Petty
Composer: Tom Petty
Album: Wildflowers

Tabbed by DJ  17th Aug 2017

I would recommend using the voicings in the text
column numbers below. 
For the GUITAR chord box for E6 you need to manually
select <2 of 59> by clicking on the forward/backward
arrows below that diagram

E6 = 022120   A     = x02220   Asus2 = x02200
E  = 022100   Bsus4 = x24400   Dsus2 = xx0230

Additional optional chords for live versions:
E         Dsus2       A       Asus2 A Asus2
You don't know how it feels...

Please take a second to scroll down to the bottom of
the page and select a star rating for my tab, thanks
=====================================================
[Reversed tape keyboards]
[tab]   [ch]E6[/ch]  
|  /  /  /  /  |  /  /  /  /  |[/tab]

[Intro]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
| /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / |[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
| /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
Let me run with you tonight,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I'll take you on a moonlight ride,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
There's someone I used to see,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
But she don't give a damn for me[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
Well, let me get to the point,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Let's roll another joint,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]Bsus4[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
And turn the radio loud, I'm too a- lone to be proud,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
And you don't know how it feels,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You don't know how it feels      ...to be me-----![/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
| /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / |[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
People come, and people go,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
Some grow young, some grow cold,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I woke up in between a memory and a dream[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
So let's get to the point, let's roll another joint,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
And let's head on down the road,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
There's some - where I gotta go,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
And you don't know how it feels,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]
You don't know how it feels      ...to be me-----![/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
| /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / |[/tab]

[tab][Bridge]
   ([ch]E[/ch])         ([ch]A[/ch])  ([ch]E[/ch])         ([ch]A[/ch])
e|-----------------|-------------------|
B|-----------------|-------------------|
G|-----------------|-------------------| [x2]
D|-----------------|-------------------|
A|---------2-5--4--|---------2-5--4----|
E|--0--3-4---------|--0--3-4--------5--|[/tab]

[tab] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Dsus2[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
| /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  / |[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
My old man was born to rock,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
He's still trying to beat the clock,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Think of me what you will, [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I've got a little space to fill[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]Bsus4[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
So let's get to the point, let's roll another joint,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]Bsus4[/ch]
And let's head on down the road,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
There's some - where I gotta go,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
And you don't know how it feels,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
You don't know how it feels,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]
No, you don't know how it feels    ...to be me----![/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
You don't know how it feels,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
You don't know how it feels,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]Dsus2[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
No, you don't know how it feels    ...to be me----![/tab]
